basic_details.job_title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Eng. Trainee and Hostel Assistant Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Eng. Trainee (Male) and Hostel Assistant Manager
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) Eng. Trainee (Male) and Hostel Assistant Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitt.edu. A total of 3 vacancies for Eng. Trainee (Male) and Hostel Assistant Manager have been announced through the NIT Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B.Tech, Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline
qualification.details: Eng. Trainee (Male): B.E / B.Tech with minimum 03 years relevant experience. Desirable: B.E / B.Tech (Electrical), experience in electrical maintenance, installation, troubleshooting, LT/HT systems, transformers, DG sets, UPS, power distribution, electrical safety standards, AutoCAD. Hostel Assistant Manager: Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline with minimum 01 year relevant experience. Desirable: Knowledge of student care and hostel operations, documentation, record-keeping, Typing, MS Office, Good Communication skills.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per minimum wages Act- Skilled category / As per minimum wages Act-Skilled
salary_details.details: Eng. Trainee (Male): As per minimum wages Act- Skilled category Hostel Assistant Manager: As per minimum wages Act-Skilled

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Tiruchirappalli to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Tiruchirappalli Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Tiruchirappalli Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Tiruchirappalli Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Tiruchirappalli Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Eng. Trainee (Male): B.E / B.Tech with minimum 03 years relevant experience. Desirable: B.E / B.Tech (Electrical), experience in electrical maintenance, installation, troubleshooting, LT/HT systems, transformers, DG sets, UPS, power distribution, electrical safety standards, AutoCAD. Hostel Assistant Manager: Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline with minimum 01 year relevant experience. Desirable: Knowledge of student care and hostel operations, documentation, record-keeping, Typing, MS Office, Good Communication skills.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Eng. Trainee (Male): As per minimum wages Act- Skilled category Hostel Assistant Manager: As per minimum wages Act-Skilled

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Tiruchirappalli to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Tiruchirappalli recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the NIT Tiruchirappalli recruitment is 19-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Eng. Trainee (Male) and Hostel Assistant Manager posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies available, with 1 for Eng. Trainee (Male) and 2 for Hostel Assistant Manager.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Hostel Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Hostel Assistant Manager post is a Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline with at least 01 year of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the NIT Tiruchirappalli recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Online.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contract.

faq.question: Q7. What is the desirable qualification for the Eng. Trainee (Male) post?
faq.answer: The desirable qualification for the Eng. Trainee (Male) post includes a B.E/B.Tech in Electrical and experience in electrical maintenance, installation, troubleshooting, and related areas.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for both posts will be as per the minimum wages Act for the Skilled category.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: NIT Tiruchirappalli is located in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu.
